channel.title: Burak's Tech Insights: AI, Software, and More
channel.description: Discover the latest in technology, software development, and AI trends with Burak's in-depth analysis and expert insights.

image.title: Burak's Tech Insights: AI, Software, and More

item.title: How to Use a Custom Domain with GitHub Pages
item.description: Learn how to set up a custom domain for your GitHub Pages website.
item.author: me@burakince.com (Burak Ince)

item.title: Generate Static Web Pages on GitHub with Next.js, Tailwind CSS & Markdown
item.description: Discover how to create static web pages on GitHub Pages with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Markdown. Follow a step-by-step guide for efficient deployment.
item.author: me@burakince.com (Burak Ince)
